name: Bread and Butter Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 bottle maple syrup on the side
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Butter a deep dish 9 inch pie plate or 9 inch square cake pan.
3. Generously butter one side of bread, but in half to make two triangles.
4. Arrange triangles, buttered side up, in prepared dish.
5. In a bowl, beat eggs well mixed with milk, sugar and vanilla; beat together.
6. Stir in raisins.
7. Slowly pour over bread making sure all bread is well soaked.
8. Bake for 45 minutes or until custard has set.
9. Serve with warm maple syrup.
